text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've become the trainer of Rice Shower, a racer
who lacks confidence in herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But rather than remain a useless girl who brings
misfortune, she's determined to change into a
blue rose that brings joy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yet her first day of training is indeed rife with
misfortune, and she ends up arriving very late.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before, she was trying to catch up to the other
racers on her own, but I extend a helping hand to
her and promise to make her talent as a racer
bloom.
